# Andrewarmanious<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Andrew Armanious — UX Designer & Digital Marketer</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;1,400&family=Outfit:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root {
  --cream: #F7F4EF;
  --ink: #1A1714;
  --warm-gray: #8A8480;
  --border: #E0DAD2;
  --gold: #B8985A;
  --white: #FDFCFB;
}
* { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }
html { scroll-behavior:smooth; }
body { background:var(--cream); color:var(--ink); font-family:'Outfit',sans-serif; font-weight:300; overflow-x:hidden; }

/* NAV */
nav {
  position:fixed; top:0; left:0; right:0; z-index:100;
  display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center;
  padding:22px 60px;
  background:rgba(247,244,239,0.95); backdrop-filter:blur(12px);
  border-bottom:1px solid transparent; transition:border-color 0.3s;
}
nav.scrolled { border-bottom-color:var(--border); }
.nav-logo { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:20px; font-weight:600; color:var(--ink); text-decoration:none; }
.nav-links { display:flex; gap:36px; list-style:none; }
.nav-links a { font-size:11px; font-weight:400; letter-spacing:2.5px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--warm-gray); text-decoration:none; transition:color 0.2s; }
.nav-links a:hover { color:var(--gold); }

/* HERO */
#hero {
  min-height:100vh; display:flex; align-items:center;
  padding:140px 60px 80px; position:relative; overflow:hidden;
}
.hero-bg { position:absolute; right:-10px; top:50%; transform:translateY(-50%); font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:clamp(140px,20vw,300px); font-weight:300; color:rgba(26,23,20,0.04); line-height:1; user-select:none; }
.hero-content { position:relative; z-index:2; max-width:760px; }
.hero-eyebrow { font-size:11px; font-weight:400; letter-spacing:4px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--gold); margin-bottom:26px; opacity:0; animation:fadeUp 0.8s 0.2s forwards; }
.hero-title { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:clamp(50px,8vw,104px); font-weight:300; line-height:0.95; letter-spacing:-2px; color:var(--ink); margin-bottom:30px; opacity:0; animation:fadeUp 0.9s 0.35s forwards; }
.hero-title em { font-style:italic; color:var(--gold); }
.hero-desc { font-size:15px; line-height:1.8; color:var(--warm-gray); max-width:500px; margin-bottom:44px; opacity:0; animation:fadeUp 0.9s 0.5s forwards; }
.hero-actions { display:flex; gap:16px; opacity:0; animation:fadeUp 0.9s 0.65s forwards; }
.btn-primary { background:var(--ink); color:var(--cream); padding:13px 32px; font-size:11px; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:2.5px; text-transform:uppercase; text-decoration:none; border:1px solid var(--ink); transition:background 0.3s,border-color 0.3s; }
.btn-primary:hover { background:var(--gold); border-color:var(--gold); }
.btn-outline { color:var(--ink); padding:13px 32px; font-size:11px; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:2.5px; text-transform:uppercase; text-decoration:none; border:1px solid var(--border); transition:border-color 0.3s,color 0.3s; }
.btn-outline:hover { border-color:var(--gold); color:var(--gold); }
.hero-scroll { position:absolute; bottom:40px; left:60px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; opacity:0; animation:fadeUp 0.9s 1s forwards; }
.scroll-line { width:40px; height:1px; background:var(--warm-gray); }
.scroll-text { font-size:10px; letter-spacing:3px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--warm-gray); }

/* SECTIONS */
section { padding:110px 60px; }
.section-label { font-size:10px; letter-spacing:4px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--gold); margin-bottom:14px; }
.section-title { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:clamp(34px,5vw,60px); font-weight:300; line-height:1.1; letter-spacing:-1px; color:var(--ink); margin-bottom:20px; }
.section-divider { width:44px; height:1px; background:var(--gold); margin-bottom:56px; }

/* ABOUT */
#about { background:var(--white); display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:90px; align-items:center; }
.about-img-wrap { position:relative; }
.about-img { width:100%; aspect-ratio:3/4; overflow:hidden; background:var(--border); }
.about-img img { width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; object-position:top; display:block; }
.about-accent { position:absolute; bottom:-18px; right:-18px; width:110px; height:110px; border:1px solid var(--gold); }
.stats { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:1px; background:var(--border); margin-top:48px; }
.stat { background:var(--white); padding:22px; }
.stat-n { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:40px; font-weight:300; color:var(--gold); line-height:1; margin-bottom:5px; }
.stat-l { font-size:10px; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--warm-gray); }
.about-text p { font-size:14px; line-height:1.9; color:var(--warm-gray); margin-bottom:18px; }
.about-text p strong { color:var(--ink); font-weight:500; }
.skills { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:8px; margin-top:28px; }
.skill { font-size:10px; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--ink); padding:6px 14px; border:1px solid var(--border); transition:border-color 0.2s,color 0.2s; }
.skill:hover { border-color:var(--gold); color:var(--gold); }

/* UX PROJECTS */
#ux-projects { background:var(--cream); }
.proj-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:2px; background:var(--border); }
.proj-card { background:var(--white); padding:44px; position:relative; overflow:hidden; transition:background 0.3s; }
.proj-card:hover { background:var(--ink); }
.proj-card:hover .proj-title { color:var(--cream); }
.proj-card:hover .proj-cat,.proj-card:hover .proj-desc,.proj-card:hover .proj-tag { color:rgba(247,244,239,0.6); }
.proj-card:hover .proj-num { color:rgba(247,244,239,0.06); }
.proj-card:hover .proj-arrow { color:var(--gold); transform:translate(4px,-4px); }
.proj-num { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:72px; font-weight:300; color:rgba(26,23,20,0.05); line-height:1; margin-bottom:-16px; transition:color 0.3s; }
.proj-cat { font-size:10px; letter-spacing:3px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--gold); margin-bottom:10px; transition:color 0.3s; }
.proj-title { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:26px; font-weight:400; color:var(--ink); margin-bottom:14px; line-height:1.3; transition:color 0.3s; }
.proj-desc { font-size:13px; line-height:1.8; color:var(--warm-gray); margin-bottom:20px; transition:color 0.3s; }
.proj-tags { display:flex; gap:8px; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:28px; }
.proj-tag { font-size:10px; letter-spacing:1.5px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--warm-gray); transition:color 0.3s; }
.proj-tag::before { content:'— '; }
.proj-arrow { font-size:20px; color:var(--warm-gray); transition:color 0.3s,transform 0.3s; display:inline-block; text-decoration:none; }

/* MARKETING */
#marketing { background:var(--ink); }
#marketing .section-title { color:var(--cream); }
#marketing .section-label { color:var(--gold); }
#marketing .section-divider { background:var(--gold); }
.mkt-intro { font-size:15px; line-height:1.85; color:rgba(247,244,239,0.55); max-width:600px; margin-bottom:60px; }

.feature-card {
  display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:0;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
  margin-bottom:2px; overflow:hidden;
}
.feature-text { padding:48px; }
.feature-eyebrow { font-size:10px; letter-spacing:3px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--gold); margin-bottom:14px; }
.feature-title { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:30px; font-weight:400; color:var(--cream); margin-bottom:16px; line-height:1.25; }
.feature-desc { font-size:13px; line-height:1.85; color:rgba(247,244,239,0.55); margin-bottom:24px; }
.feature-tags { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:8px; margin-bottom:28px; }
.feature-tag { font-size:10px; letter-spacing:1.5px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--gold); padding:5px 12px; border:1px solid rgba(184,152,90,0.3); }
.feature-link { font-size:11px; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--gold); text-decoration:none; }
.feature-link:hover { opacity:0.7; }
.feature-img { overflow:hidden; }
.feature-img img { width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; filter:brightness(0.8); display:block; }

.mkt-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); gap:1px; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06); margin-top:2px; }
.mkt-card { background:var(--ink); padding:36px 32px; transition:background 0.3s; border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05); }
.mkt-card:hover { background:#221F1B; }
.mkt-icon { font-size:26px; margin-bottom:18px; }
.mkt-title { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:21px; font-weight:400; color:var(--cream); margin-bottom:10px; }
.mkt-desc { font-size:13px; line-height:1.8; color:rgba(247,244,239,0.5); margin-bottom:16px; }
.mkt-date { font-size:10px; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; color:rgba(247,244,239,0.25); }

.certs { margin-top:60px; padding-top:40px; border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07); display:flex; gap:36px; align-items:center; flex-wrap:wrap; }
.cert-lbl { font-size:10px; letter-spacing:3px; text-transform:uppercase; color:rgba(247,244,239,0.3); }
.cert-badges { display:flex; gap:12px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
.cert-badge { font-size:11px; letter-spacing:1.5px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--gold); padding:7px 16px; border:1px solid rgba(184,152,90,0.3); }

/* RESUME */
#resume { background:var(--white); }
.resume-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:72px; }
.resume-col-title { font-size:10px; letter-spacing:4px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--gold); margin-bottom:28px; padding-bottom:14px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); }
.resume-item { padding:22px 0; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); }
.resume-item:last-child { border-bottom:none; }
.r-date { font-size:10px; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--gold); margin-bottom:5px; }
.r-role { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:19px; font-weight:400; color:var(--ink); margin-bottom:3px; }
.r-org { font-size:12px; letter-spacing:0.5px; color:var(--warm-gray); margin-bottom:9px; }
.r-detail { font-size:13px; line-height:1.7; color:var(--warm-gray); }
.resume-cta { margin-top:56px; text-align:center; }

/* CONTACT */
#contact { background:var(--cream); text-align:center; }
.contact-inner { max-width:620px; margin:0 auto; }
.contact-email { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:clamp(22px,4vw,44px); font-weight:300; color:var(--ink); text-decoration:none; display:inline-block; margin:36px 0; position:relative; letter-spacing:-0.5px; transition:color 0.3s; }
.contact-email::after { content:''; position:absolute; bottom:-3px; left:0; width:0; height:1px; background:var(--gold); transition:width 0.4s; }
.contact-email:hover { color:var(--gold); }
.contact-email:hover::after { width:100%; }
.contact-row { display:flex; justify-content:center; gap:44px; margin-top:44px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
.contact-item-label { font-size:9px; letter-spacing:3px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--warm-gray); margin-bottom:5px; }
.contact-item-value { font-size:14px; color:var(--ink); }

/* FOOTER */
footer { padding:28px 60px; background:var(--ink); display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:12px; }
.footer-copy { font-size:11px; color:rgba(247,244,239,0.3); letter-spacing:1px; }
.footer-links { display:flex; gap:20px; }
.footer-links a { font-size:11px; color:rgba(247,244,239,0.4); text-decoration:none; letter-spacing:1px; transition:color 0.2s; }
.footer-links a:hover { color:var(--gold); }

/* ANIMATIONS */
@keyframes fadeUp { from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)} to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)} }
.reveal { opacity:0; transform:translateY(28px); transition:opacity 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1),transform 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1); }
.reveal.visible { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); }

/* RESPONSIVE */
@media(max-width:900px){
  nav{padding:18px 20px;}
  .nav-links{gap:16px;}
  .nav-links a{font-size:10px;}
  section{padding:72px 20px;}
  #hero{padding:110px 20px 60px;}
  #about{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:40px;}
  .proj-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .feature-card{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .feature-img{height:220px;}
  .mkt-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .resume-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:40px;}
  footer{padding:24px 20px;}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<nav id="navbar">
  <a href="#hero" class="nav-logo">Andrew Armanious</a>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#ux-projects">UX Work</a></li>
    <li><a href="#marketing">Marketing</a></li>
    <li><a href="#resume">Resume</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section id="hero">
  <div class="hero-bg">AA</div>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <p class="hero-eyebrow">UX Designer &amp; Digital Marketing Specialist — Kingston, Ontario</p>
    <h1 class="hero-title">Designing<br><em>experiences</em><br>that convert.</h1>
    <p class="hero-desc">I bridge intuitive user experience with strategic marketing — creating digital products that are both beautifully usable and business-driven.</p>
    <div class="hero-actions">
      <a href="#ux-projects" class="btn-primary">View My Work</a>
      <a href="#contact" class="btn-outline">Get In Touch</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-scroll">
    <div class="scroll-line"></div>
    <span class="scroll-text">Scroll to explore</span>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section id="about">
  <div class="about-img-wrap reveal">
    <div class="about-img">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Andrew Armanious">
    </div>
    <div class="about-accent"></div>
    <div class="stats">
      <div class="stat"><div class="stat-n">3+</div><div class="stat-l">Diplomas &amp; Certs</div></div>
      <div class="stat"><div class="stat-n">7+</div><div class="stat-l">Years Experience</div></div>
      <div class="stat"><div class="stat-n">2</div><div class="stat-l">Certifications</div></div>
      <div class="stat"><div class="stat-n">∞</div><div class="stat-l">Curiosity for Design</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="about-text reveal">
    <p class="section-label">About Me</p>
    <h2 class="section-title">Where design<br>meets strategy.</h2>
    <div class="section-divider"></div>
    <p>I'm <strong>Andrew Armanious</strong> — a UX Designer and Digital Marketing Specialist based in Kingston, Ontario. I hold a Graduate Certificate in UX Design (in progress), a Graduate Certificate in Digital Marketing (Distinction), and an Advanced Diploma in Business Administration Marketing.</p>
    <p>What makes my approach different is that I don't just design screens — I design <strong>outcomes</strong>. Every wireframe, journey map, and campaign I build is grounded in real user needs and tied to measurable business goals.</p>
    <p>I'm currently open to full-time roles in <strong>UX Design, Digital Marketing,</strong> or <strong>Product Strategy</strong>.</p>
    <div class="skills">
      <span class="skill">User Research</span>
      <span class="skill">Wireframing</span>
      <span class="skill">Usability Testing</span>
      <span class="skill">Journey Mapping</span>
      <span class="skill">Digital Marketing</span>
      <span class="skill">SEO / SEM</span>
      <span class="skill">Branding</span>
      <span class="skill">Content Strategy</span>
      <span class="skill">Figma</span>
      <span class="skill">Canva</span>
      <span class="skill">Excel</span>
      <span class="skill">Analytics</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- UX PROJECTS -->
<section id="ux-projects">
  <p class="section-label reveal">Selected Work</p>
  <h2 class="section-title reveal">UX Design Projects</h2>
  <div class="section-divider reveal"></div>
  <div class="proj-grid">
    <div class="proj-card reveal">
      <div class="proj-num">01</div>
      <p class="proj-cat">UX Design · Redesign</p>
      <h3 class="proj-title">Blackboard Calendar Redesign</h3>
      <p class="proj-desc">A full wireframe redesign of the Blackboard LMS calendar for St. Lawrence College — improving usability, information hierarchy, and student task management through user-centered design.</p>
      <div class="proj-tags"><span class="proj-tag">Wireframing</span><span class="proj-tag">Usability</span><span class="proj-tag">Information Architecture</span></div>
      <a href="https://www.figma.com/design/Y5zicgf5KghWUUCUHSsx1n/Andrew-Blackboard-Calendar" target="_blank" class="proj-arrow">↗</a>
    </div>
    <div class="proj-card reveal">
      <div class="proj-num">02</div>
      <p class="proj-cat">UX Design · Data-Driven</p>
      <h3 class="proj-title">Data-Driven UX: Enhancing User Experiences</h3>
      <p class="proj-desc">An exploration of how analytics directly inform UX decisions — from heatmaps to A/B testing — creating measurably better digital experiences with higher engagement and satisfaction.</p>
      <div class="proj-tags"><span class="proj-tag">User Research</span><span class="proj-tag">Analytics</span><span class="proj-tag">A/B Testing</span></div>
      <span class="proj-arrow">↗</span>
    </div>
    <div class="proj-card reveal">
      <div class="proj-num">03</div>
      <p class="proj-cat">UX Design · Strategy</p>
      <h3 class="proj-title">Mastering User Engagement Strategies</h3>
      <p class="proj-desc">A strategic framework for designing interfaces that retain users — covering onboarding flows, feedback loops, and interaction patterns grounded in real user behavior research.</p>
      <div class="proj-tags"><span class="proj-tag">Interaction Design</span><span class="proj-tag">Journey Mapping</span><span class="proj-tag">Prototyping</span></div>
      <span class="proj-arrow">↗</span>
    </div>
    <div class="proj-card reveal">
      <div class="proj-num">04</div>
      <p class="proj-cat">Graphic Design · Branding</p>
      <h3 class="proj-title">Graphic Design &amp; Magazine Cover</h3>
      <p class="proj-desc">A graphic design project demonstrating layout, typography, and visual branding through a polished magazine cover — showcasing editorial design thinking and visual hierarchy skills.</p>
      <div class="proj-tags"><span class="proj-tag">Graphic Design</span><span class="proj-tag">Typography</span><span class="proj-tag">Branding</span></div>
      <span class="proj-arrow">↗</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- MARKETING -->
<section id="marketing">
  <p class="section-label reveal">Marketing Work</p>
  <h2 class="section-title reveal">Real-World Projects</h2>
  <div class="section-divider reveal"></div>
  <p class="mkt-intro reveal">From founding my own business to leading full marketing campaigns for real clients — here's a selection of hands-on work I've delivered.</p>

  <!-- Dashcam Kings Feature -->
  <div class="feature-card reveal">
    <div class="feature-text">
      <p class="feature-eyebrow">Founder · Brand · Web · Social · Campaign</p>
      <h3 class="feature-title">Dashcam Kings</h3>
      <p class="feature-desc">Founded and built Dashcam Kings — a mobile dashcam installation business — from the ground up. Responsible for the full brand identity, website design and development, social media presence across Instagram, TikTok and Facebook, a digital ad strategy, and a survey-driven lead generation campaign with a free installation giveaway.</p>
      <div class="feature-tags">
        <span class="feature-tag">Branding</span>
        <span class="feature-tag">Website Design</span>
        <span class="feature-tag">Social Media</span>
        <span class="feature-tag">Email Marketing</span>
        <span class="feature-tag">SEO</span>
      </div>
      <a href="https://deezertips.wixsite.com/dashcam-kings" target="_blank" class="feature-link">Visit Live Site ↗</a>
    </div>
    <div class="feature-img">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Dashcam Kings Social Media Content">
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- 3 cards -->
  <div class="mkt-grid">
    <div class="mkt-card reveal">
      <div class="mkt-icon">📋</div>
      <h3 class="mkt-title">Dashcam Kings — Full Marketing Plan</h3>
      <p class="mkt-desc">Co-led a comprehensive 2,000 digital marketing strategy as Project Coordinator and client. Covered primary research (survey), audience analysis, competitor research, SEO, social media campaigns, and email marketing with measurable KPIs.</p>
      <p class="mkt-date">St. Lawrence College · March 2025</p>
    </div>
    <div class="mkt-card reveal">
      <div class="mkt-icon">🎯</div>
      <h3 class="mkt-title">Mindful Marketing — Agency Pitch Book</h3>
      <p class="mkt-desc">Co-created a full agency pitch book covering brand identity, value proposition, competitive advantage, team expertise, and a client engagement strategy. Presented to professors and real clients.</p>
      <p class="mkt-date">St. Lawrence College · November 2024</p>
    </div>
    <div class="mkt-card reveal">
      <div class="mkt-icon">📱</div>
      <h3 class="mkt-title">Social Media Content Creation</h3>
      <p class="mkt-desc">Designed and produced a full suite of branded social content for Dashcam Kings — Instagram posts, story campaigns, QR code giveaway content, and an "Are you him?" awareness campaign targeting Kingston-area drivers.</p>
      <p class="mkt-date">Dashcam Kings · 2024–2025</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="certs reveal">
    <span class="cert-lbl">Certified by</span>
    <div class="cert-badges">
      <span class="cert-badge">Google — Jan 2025</span>
      <span class="cert-badge">Semrush — Jan 2024</span>
      <span class="cert-badge">Distinction Graduate</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- RESUME -->
<section id="resume">
  <p class="section-label reveal">Background</p>
  <h2 class="section-title reveal">Experience &amp; Education</h2>
  <div class="section-divider reveal"></div>
  <div class="resume-grid">
    <div class="reveal">
      <p class="resume-col-title">Work Experience</p>
      <div class="resume-item">
        <p class="r-date">May 2025 – Aug 2025</p>
        <p class="r-role">Facilities Maintenance Specialist</p>
        <p class="r-org">York Region District School Board · Vaughan, ON</p>
        <p class="r-detail">Coordinated facilities operations across multiple sites, applying strong communication and problem-solving skills in a high-accountability environment.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="resume-item">
        <p class="r-date">May 2024 – Aug 2024</p>
        <p class="r-role">Inventory Specialist</p>
        <p class="r-org">York Region District School Board · Newmarket, ON</p>
        <p class="r-detail">Managed and tracked inventory using Microsoft Excel; developed reporting processes that improved data visibility for operations teams.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="resume-item">
        <p class="r-date">Sep 2023 – May 2024</p>
        <p class="r-role">Keyholder</p>
        <p class="r-org">American Eagle Outfitters · Richmond Hill, ON</p>
        <p class="r-detail">Led store operations, drove customer engagement, and managed inventory and visual merchandising protocols.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="resume-item">
        <p class="r-date">Mar 2022 – Sep 2023</p>
        <p class="r-role">Keyholder</p>
        <p class="r-org">Zumiez · Vaughan, ON</p>
        <p class="r-detail">Supervised daily retail operations, led team to consistently meet sales targets, and maintained inventory accuracy.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="reveal">
      <p class="resume-col-title">Education</p>
      <div class="resume-item">
        <p class="r-date">Sep 2025 – Apr 2026</p>
        <p class="r-role">Graduate Certificate, UX Design</p>
        <p class="r-org">St. Lawrence College · In Progress</p>
        <p class="r-detail">Wireframing, Usability Testing, Journey Mapping, Prototyping, Website Building.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="resume-item">
        <p class="r-date">Sep 2024 – Apr 2025</p>
        <p class="r-role">Graduate Certificate, Digital Marketing</p>
        <p class="r-org">St. Lawrence College · Graduated with Distinction</p>
        <p class="r-detail">SEO/SEM, Content Strategy, Branding, Digital Campaigns. GPA 3.5–4.0.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="resume-item">
        <p class="r-date">Completed</p>
        <p class="r-role">Advanced Diploma, Business Administration Marketing</p>
        <p class="r-org">Seneca Polytechnic</p>
        <p class="r-detail">Business strategy, marketing fundamentals, communication, and analytics.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="resume-item">
        <p class="r-date">Completed</p>
        <p class="r-role">Ontario Secondary School Diploma</p>
        <p class="r-org">St. Elizabeth Catholic High School · Ontario Scholar</p>
        <p class="r-detail">Graduated as an Ontario Scholar. Marketing Fair Award recipient.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="resume-cta reveal">
    <a href="mailto:andrewarmanious18@gmail.com?subject=Resume Request" class="btn-primary">Request Full Resume</a>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONTACT -->
<section id="contact">
  <div class="contact-inner">
    <p class="section-label reveal">Let's Talk</p>
    <h2 class="section-title reveal">Open to new<br>opportunities.</h2>
    <div class="section-divider reveal" style="margin:0 auto 0;"></div>
    <a href="mailto:andrewarmanious18@gmail.com" class="contact-email reveal">andrewarmanious18@gmail.com</a>
    <div class="contact-row reveal">
      <div class="contact-item"><p class="contact-item-label">Phone</p><p class="contact-item-value">647 281 3080</p></div>
      <div class="contact-item"><p class="contact-item-label">Location</p><p class="contact-item-value">Kingston, Ontario</p></div>
      <div class="contact-item"><p class="contact-item-label">Status</p><p class="contact-item-value" style="color:var(--gold);">Open to Work</p></div>
      <div class="contact-item"><p class="contact-item-label">LinkedIn</p><p class="contact-item-value"><a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/andrewarmanious" target="_blank" style="color:var(--ink);text-decoration:none;">andrewarmanious</a></p></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <p class="footer-copy">© 2025 Andrew Armanious. All rights reserved.</p>
  <div class="footer-links">
    <a href="#about">About</a>
    <a href="#ux-projects">Work</a>
    <a href="#marketing">Marketing</a>
    <a href="#contact">Contact</a>
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/andrewarmanious" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a>
  </div>
</footer>

<script>
window.addEventListener('scroll',()=>{
  document.getElementById('navbar').classList.toggle('scrolled',window.scrollY>40);
});
const obs=new IntersectionObserver((entries)=>{
  entries.forEach((e,i)=>{
    if(e.isIntersecting){setTimeout(()=>e.target.classList.add('visible'),i*70);obs.unobserve(e.target);}
  });
},{threshold:0.08});
document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el=>obs.observe(el));
</script>
</body>
</html>
